case_title: JAMES H CANTRELL VS. THOMAS MULLIN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, JAMES H CPM, RECEIVER AS TO DEFENDANT MULLIN, THOMAS DOES 1 TO X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, JAMES H CPM, RECEIVER SERVED DEC-06-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT MULLIN, THOMAS
